title: Lubricant Mod
description: Lubricant is a dark Minecraft mod exploring the grim synergy between death and magic. Harness forbidden energy, siphon souls, and power your spells with the slick essence of decay. Here, death isn’t the end it’s the fuel for rituals, weapon‑bound magic
body: ![Lubricant Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0910526b57e28303579aff2920fcd520b4bcd66.png) # 🕷️**What Is Lubricant Mod** Lubricant is a shadow drenched Minecraft mod exploring the twisted bond between death and arcane power. Tap into forbidden energies, drain lingering souls, and wield magic shaped by the slick, corrupted essence of decay. This mod introduces new weapons, custom items, corrupted blocks, ritual components, and powerful crafting recipes all fueled by the remnants of the dead. # ‼️**Required Dependencies** This library depends on [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), but you should already have that installed. ## 📜**Credits & License** Credit goes all towards my contributers on github All Rights Reserved This mod and all associated files, assets, code, textures, models, sounds, and documentation are the exclusive property of the creator. You may NOT: Redistribute this mod in any form, including modpacks, websites, or file hosts. Modify, decompile, or create derivative works based on this mod. Reuse or repurpose any assets, code, or content from this mod. Reupload this mod to any platform without explicit written permission from the creator. You MAY: Download and use this mod for personal, non-commercial gameplay. By downloading or using this mod, you agree to these terms. © [2026] [SeaSerpant1040, Apocalypsing]. All Rights Reserved. ## 👺**Mob Drops** - Hoglin = Lard - Warden = Warden Head, Warden Heart, Warden Tendril - Evoker = Totem of Uncleansing - Rose Bush = Music Disc - I'll Love you forever - Allay = Music Disc - Endless Love - End City Loot = Music Disc - Aura and Light - Pillager Outpost Loot Music Disc - Our Successful Stories - Ruined Portal = Music Disc - Memories - Shipwreck Loot = Anchor Blade Handle - Deepslate Gold Ore = Mineral Fragment - Ancient City Loot = Pendant of Souls - Wither Skeleton = Reaper's Keys - Skeleton = Souls - Stray = Absolute Zero Fragment # ⬆️**Newest Updates** **❄️ ANNOUNCEMENT: THE FROSTED EXPANSION IS HERE! ❄️** The world is about to get a lot colder. Get ready for our next Major Update, packed with a blizzard of new content: - 👾 New Boss: Face off against a chilling new legendary threat. - ⚔️ New Weapons: Arm yourself with powerful gear to survive the tundra. - 🧱 New Blocks: Build your ultimate winter fortress with fresh materials. - ⚙️ New Mechanics: Master brand-new ways to play and interact with the world. Prepare yourselves the frost is spreading. # 🔮**What is the plan for the future?** To add even more cool features to the Minecraft mod, enhancing the modded experience and giving players more opportunities as they explore everything the mod offers.
